new_hire_deadline_text: within six months of their employment
applicable_to: employees likely to interact with victims
required_topics: identification and characteristics of human trafficking
legal rights and resources available to victims
recordkeeping_requirements: maintain records of the training provided, including dates, types of training, and signatures of participants
records must be maintained for at least five years after the last date of training
risks_or_constraints: non-compliance may result in penalties, including fines and potential citations
